hero.eyebrow: Manufacturer and Authorised Supplier of Medical Equipment
hero.title: Built in Mumbai. Trusted by Institutions since 1968
hero.description:
PEIC manufactures CSSD and sterilisation equipment at its Mumbai factory and is an authorised supplier of medical equipment and technologies for 14+ leading global and domestic brands.

We support hospitals, medical colleges, government facilities, laboratories, and specialty departments across Central Sterile Services (CSSD), Operating Theatre (OT), radiology/imaging, critical care, neonatal/maternal care, oncology, dental, diagnostics, and more.

trust_banner: Serving Hospitals, Government Facilities & Medical Colleges

hero_panel.title: OEM manufacturer with direct service accountability
hero_panel.description: Long manufacturing heritage, 14 integrated global and domestic brands, and a single post-sale service relationship. All under 1 partner.

specs.label: Scope
specs.value: Manufactured Equipment + 14 Global and Domestic Brands

capabilities.label: Core Capabilities
capabilities.title: Two Ways PEIC Supports Healthcare Institutions

cards.title: PEIC-Manufactured Sterilisation/CSSD Equipment
cards.description: BIS-certified CSSD, autoclave, and sterilisation equipment manufactured and assembled at PEIC’s Mumbai facility, with engineering, documentation, spares, and lifecycle service held close to the source.

cards.title: Authorised Medical Equipment Supplies
cards.description: Authorised supplier and integration partner for 14+ global and Indian medical equipment brands across all hospital departments, with support for specification, quotation, installation, training, documentation, and service coordination.

capabilities.description:
PEIC brings a manufacturer’s technical discipline to both its own sterilisation systems and the medical equipment brands it supplies.

For biomedical and procurement teams, that means fewer handoffs, clearer accountability, coordinated documentation, and service support from a technical partner who understands equipment beyond the quotation stage.

workflow.label: How PEIC Adds Value
workflow.title: One accountable chain, from need to uptime.

steps.title: Diagnose Requirements
steps.description: Department need, site constraints, budget, and documentation

steps.title: Solution Fit
steps.description: PEIC-manufactured systems and/or authorised partner equipment

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Installation, commissioning, validation support, and training

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Spares, AMC/CMC, Service Escalation, and Refurbishment through lifecycle

advantage.label: Why PEIC
advantage.title: The PEIC Advantage: Technical Accountability Beyond Supply
advantage.description:
Medical equipment procurement should not end at quotation and delivery. PEIC is an active manufacturer with in-house engineering, production, service, and documentation capabilities.

That manufacturing base shapes how we support even the equipment we supply from partner brands: with better specification support, clearer technical coordination, fewer vendor handoffs, and a single accountable relationship for procurement, integration, and service.

Our engineering and service teams support installation, local integration, AMC/CMC planning, spare parts coordination, and refurbishment for PEIC-manufactured systems and supported partner-brand equipment.

clients.label: Our Existing Clients
clients.title: Institutional Relationships Built Over Decades
clients.description:
For nearly six decades, PEIC has supplied medical equipment, sterilisation systems, department-support hardware, and engineering service to public hospitals, corporate hospitals, research institutions, railway hospitals, medical colleges, and specialty healthcare facilities.

Our long operating history, BIS-certified manufacturing base, and local serviceability have made PEIC a trusted technical partner for institutions that need reliability beyond the purchase order.

clients_list.name: Indian Railways
clients_list.tagline: Western, Central, Northern, ECOR & South-Eastern zones

cta.label: Enquiry
cta.title: Need specifications, pricing, or service support?
cta.description: Share your requirement and PEIC will respond with the next relevant step within 1 business day.
